features.name: always block with clock and async reset in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with both clock edge and reset edge in the sensitivity list separated by 'or'

features.name: non-blocking assignment in reset branch of clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment inside an if statement that checks the reset condition within a clocked always block

features.name: register with async reset and constant load value
features.description: Code should include a register output signal with non-blocking assignment of a constant value in both reset and clock branches
